items.title: The Man Who Built Amazon Dynamo and Apache Cassandra Is Now Solving AI's Accountability Crisis
items.summary: Every day, engineering teams at thousands of companies are shipping code written by AI. Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot -- the tools have changed how fast software gets built. What hasn't changed: those same companies have no verifiable record of which lines were AI-generated, what it cost, or who authorized it. That's not a gap in visibility. That's a liability.
